title: Marlow by Steampunk Hatter Black Leather Steampunk Top Hat
conditionNotes: The hat appears to be in good used condition. The leather shows minor creasing consistent with wear, but no major scuffs, tears, or damage are visible. The metal conchos on the band are intact. The interior looks clean, and the brand tag is clearly legible.

title: Large Bulk Lot of Mixed Heroclix Style Miniatures w/ Dials + Clear Storage Box
conditionNotes: The miniatures appear used but generally intact. Some custom markings (like 'S' or 'K5') are visible on the bases, which may indicate user modification or specific game notes. The paint jobs vary, suggesting they are either user-painted or from various sets, consistent with a mixed lot. Overall condition is fair to good for a used bulk lot, with no obvious broken pieces, though minor scuffs or bent elements common with plastic miniatures are possible. The clear plastic storage container is also used but functional, with no visible cracks or significant damage, providing excellent organization for the figures.

title: Vintage Dungeons & Dragons OD&D White Box 3-Volume Set (Collector's Ed. 6th/7th Printing) 1974-1977 TSR Gygax Arneson
conditionNotes:
The outer box shows significant wear, discoloration, foxing, staining, and scuffing, particularly on edges and corners. The lid is present and detached. The 'Original 'Collector's Edition'' starburst is clearly visible on the box. The three booklets ('Men & Magic', 'Monsters & Treasure', 'The Underworld & Wilderness Adventures') appear complete; pages show expected age-related yellowing/browning and minor wear, but no visible major rips, tears, or extensive writing from the provided images. Original D&D Reference Sheets are present and show age. An original 'Chess & Games, Inc.' order form/sheet is included, showing age-related wear.
